maxActiveTasks.title: Task Limit Reached
maxActiveTasks.message: Your current plan allows up to {{limit}} active tasks. Upgrade to {{requiredPlan}} to create more tasks.

kanbanView.title: Kanban View Not Available
kanbanView.message: Kanban view is available on the {{requiredPlan}} plan.

maxProjects.title: Project Limit Reached
maxProjects.message: Your current plan allows up to {{limit}} projects. Upgrade to {{requiredPlan}} to create more projects.

maxSectionsPerProject.title: Section Limit Reached
maxSectionsPerProject.message: Your current plan allows up to {{limit}} sections per project. Upgrade to {{requiredPlan}} to add more sections.

recurringEvents.title: Recurring Events Not Available
recurringEvents.message: Recurring events are available on the {{requiredPlan}} plan.

fileStorage.title: Storage Limit Reached
fileStorage.message: You've reached your {{limit}}GB limit. Upgrade to {{requiredPlan}} for more space.
